jobs.title: Bartender
jobs.description: We are looking for an enthusiastic bartender to provide an excellent guest drinking experience. Good bartenders will be able to create classic and innovative drinks exceeding customers' needs and expectations. Compensation includes salary and tips.
responsibilities: Prepare alcohol or non-alcohol beverages for bar and restaurant patrons
Interact with customers, take orders, serve snacks and drinks
Assess customers' needs and preferences and make recommendations
Mix ingredients to prepare cocktails
Check customers' identification and confirm legal drinking age
Restock and replenish bar inventory and supplies
Stay guest-focused and nurture an excellent guest experience
Comply with all food and beverage regulations
requirements: Resume and proven working experience as a bartender
Excellent knowledge of mixing, garnishing, and serving drinks
Computer literacy
Knowledge of a second language is a plus
Positive attitude and excellent communication skills
Ability to keep the bar organized, stocked, and clean
Relevant training certificate
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Barback
jobs.description: Responsible for maintaining the bar's cleanliness, restocking supplies, assisting bartenders, and ensuring a smooth operational flow to provide efficient and enjoyable customer experiences.
responsibilities: Maintain cleanliness and organization of the bar area
Restock and replenish bar supplies, including glassware and ingredients
Assist bartenders in preparing and serving drinks
Collect and dispose of empty glasses and bottles efficiently
Ensure the bar is well-equipped and ready for peak service hours
Support bartenders with tasks to maintain smooth operational flow
Contribute to creating a positive and enjoyable atmosphere for customers
requirements: Prior experience in a barback or hospitality role preferred
Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
Physical stamina to lift supplies and stand for extended periods
Excellent teamwork and communication skills
Basic knowledge of bar equipment, glassware, and drink ingredients
Flexible schedule, including evenings, weekends, and holidays
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Cashier
jobs.description: El Pueblo is looking for energetic cashiers who want to provide excellent customer service. Cashiers are responsible for customer service, cash handling, proper food handling, ensuring orders are placed correctly and delivered quickly, cleaning, restocking, and more.
responsibilities: Provide excellent customer service to all patrons
Handle cash transactions accurately and efficiently
Adhere to proper food handling guidelines and hygiene standards
Ensure customer orders are taken and placed correctly
Work to ensure timely delivery of orders
Maintain a clean and organized cashier station
Restock necessary supplies such as napkins, straws, and utensils
Collaborate with kitchen and wait staff for seamless order fulfillment
Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and requests professionally
Accurately handle credit card and other payment transactions
Follow all company policies and procedures
requirements: Strong commitment to exceptional customer service
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
Ability to handle cash transactions accurately
Knowledge of proper food handling and hygiene
Attention to detail in order taking and placement
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Basic math skills for totals and change
Team collaboration skills
Flexibility for varying shifts including weekends and holidays
Positive attitude and friendly demeanor
Previous cashier or customer service experience is a plus
POS familiarity is advantageous

jobs.title: Cook
jobs.description: We are a fast-paced Mexican restaurant looking for a responsible, reliable Cook.
responsibilities: Prepare and cook a variety of traditional Mexican dishes
Follow recipes and adhere to our standard preparation methods
Ensure food quality, taste, and presentation meet our standards
Inspect and clean cooking equipment and work areas
Coordinate with kitchen staff for timely service
Stock and maintain inventory of food and supplies
Communicate with the kitchen manager for reordering
Adapt recipes to meet special dietary needs
Ensure compliance with food safety regulations
Follow portion control to minimize waste
Assist in training new kitchen staff
Work efficiently during busy periods
requirements: Food Handler's Certificate
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Prep Cook
jobs.description: We are a fast-paced Mexican restaurant looking for a responsible, reliable Prep Cook.
responsibilities: Wash and chop fresh vegetables for salsa
Prepare and marinate meats for tacos
Make guacamole and ensure it's fresh and flavorful
Prepare and cook rice and beans
Grate cheese and ensure an adequate supply
Prepare and slice limes for garnish
Make fresh batches of pico de gallo
Prepare and fry tortilla chips
Ensure a stock of fresh tortillas
Organize and restock ingredients for the next shift
requirements: Food Handler's Certificate
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Dishwasher
jobs.description: Join our dynamic team as a Restaurant Dishwasher. You'll play a crucial role in maintaining the cleanliness and organization of our kitchen — ensuring timely cleaning and sanitization of all dishes, utensils, and kitchen equipment.
responsibilities: Wash and sanitize dishes, glassware, flatware, and kitchen equipment
Organize and stack cleaned dishes for quick access
Properly handle and store cleaned items
Remove trash and recyclables from kitchen and dining areas
Clean and sanitize kitchen surfaces and food prep areas
Support kitchen staff with food prep as needed
Comply with health and safety regulations
Work efficiently during peak hours
Maintain a positive, collaborative attitude
Report equipment malfunctions or maintenance needs
requirements: Prior dishwashing experience a plus, not required
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Physical stamina to stand for long periods and lift heavy loads
Strong responsibility and attention to cleanliness
Excellent communication and teamwork
Flexibility for evenings, weekends, and holidays
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Busser / Food Runner
jobs.description: Facilitate collaboration between our kitchen and wait staff. Responsibilities include setting tables, serving food orders, removing used dishes and utensils, and washing dishes. You'll ensure our guests have a high-quality dining experience by serving food in a timely, accurate manner.
responsibilities: Deliver food orders from the kitchen rapidly and accurately
Act as contact point between front-of-house and back-of-house
Assist wait staff with table setting and utensils
Ensure food is served per safety standards (proper temperature)
Check in with customers and take additional orders or refill water
Remove dirty dishes and utensils
Answer guest questions about ingredients and menu items
Inform staff about customer feedback or requests
requirements: Experience as a Food Expeditor or similar entry-level role
Understanding of hygiene and food safety rules
Physical ability to carry heavy trays and stand for long hours
Availability for various shifts including weekends
Multi-tasking abilities
Good oral communication
Remain calm and professional under pressure
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Shift Leader
jobs.description: We are a fast-paced Mexican restaurant looking for responsible, reliable Supervisors to lead our teams.
responsibilities: Lead and supervise a shift of 5-7 team members: cashier/server, line cook, prep, sanitation
Champion a spirit of teamwork and pride in quality customer service
Ensure guests receive kind, courteous, prompt service
Ensure food is prepared correctly with utmost quality
Maintain food safety standards
Bilingual — English/Spanish is a plus
Highly dependable and reliable
Flexible schedule including nights, weekends, holidays
Team-oriented leader, leads by example
Excellent problem-solving and reasoning
Operate a POS system and cash register
Authorized to work in the U.S.
requirements: Food Handler's Certificate
3-5 years of restaurant management experience
benefits: One free meal during your shift

jobs.title: Store Manager
jobs.description: Lead and supervise the full restaurant team — cashiers, preps, cooks, and more. Maintain a positive work environment and deliver quality customer service at every shift.
responsibilities: Lead and supervise the team: Cashiers, Preps, Cooks, and more
Champion teamwork and pride in quality customer service
Ensure guests receive kind, courteous, prompt service
Ensure food is prepared correctly with utmost quality
Maintain food safety standards
Ensure breaks and meals are taken on time
requirements: 3-5 years experience in restaurant management (REQUIRED — applications without will not be considered)
Highly dependable and reliable
Flexible schedule including nights, weekends, holidays
Team-oriented leader, leads by example
Excellent problem-solving and reasoning
Operate a POS system and cash register
Authorized to work in the U.S.
